children.heading: .—Terms and Conditions of Loan Guarantees
children.label: a .—Terms and Conditions of Loan Guarantees
children.text: In issuing a guarantee under this subchapter for a medium-term or long-term loan, the Secretary may not offer terms and conditions more beneficial than those that would be provided to the recipient by the Export-Import Bank of the United States under similar circumstances in conjunction with the provision of guarantees for nondefense articles and services.

children.heading: .—Losses Arising From Fraud or Misrepresentation
children.label: b .—Losses Arising From Fraud or Misrepresentation
children.text: No payment may be made under a guarantee issued under this subchapter for a loss arising out of fraud or misrepresentation for which the party seeking payment is responsible.

children.heading: .—No Right of Acceleration
children.label: c .—No Right of Acceleration
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may not accelerate any guaranteed loan or increment, and may not pay any amount, in respect of a guarantee issued under this subchapter, other than in accordance with the original payment terms of the loan.
